text.title: Notion PM Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Notion PM.

example.scenario: 3-person team: workspace at notion.so/faion, single Tasks DB with 14 properties, Sprint as relation, 2-week cycles. Native automation sets default Status=Backlog; n8n posts daily standup digest to #daily-standup at 11:00 and writes sprint closure metrics back into Sprints DB.
